scripts.dev:api: yarn workspace @myapp/shared build && yarn workspace @myapp/api start:dev
scripts.docker:prod: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --profile all up -d
scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml --profile all up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from api
